---
title: FIMS Calendar
---

FIMS has both reoccurring meetings (e.g., FIMS Code Club and FIMS Implementation Team meetings) and one-off meetings each month. See the calendar below for meeting descriptions and links to running notes. If the meeting is public, there will be a hyperlink in the description with the Google Meet link so you can join in on the fun! 

Let us know (see the [contact page](../contact/index.qmd)) if there are meetings you are interested in joining since not all meeting links are provided in the calendar. However, Implementation Team meetings are currently limited to [Implementation Team members](../contact/contributors.qmd#core-developers).

Add FIMS calendar to your own by clicking the blue text "Add to calendar", at the bottom of the calendar.

<iframe src="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/embed?src=c_6eluv1h8o830k7vt8ctcs6ghto%40group.calendar.google.com&ctz=America%2FNew_York" style="border: 0" width="800" height="600" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" title="FIMS Community Calendar"></iframe>
